[The Haridradruma is called Maradarasina in Kannada. The
ordinary arasina is turmeric.]

If in a waterless place are seen the characteristics of a watery
region or soft Vlrana grass or Durva, water will be found there
at 5 cubits below the earth. Or if a kind of brinjal (?) Trivrta (white
variety of Teori), Danti, Sukarapadl, Laksmapa and Navamalika
(Double Jasmine) creeper be found to be growing in a place, water
will be got at a depth of 15 cubits and two-cubits to the south of
these herbs.

Exploration of Water Springs LIV 609
